# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"

services:
  - name: service1
    url: http://service1.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/service1

  - name: service2
    url: http://service2.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/service2

upstreams:
  - name: upstream-service1
    targets:
      - target: 192.168.0.1:9001
      - target: 192.168.0.2:9001
    load_balancing: round_robin

  - name: upstream-service2
    targets:
      - target: 192.168.0.3:9002
      - target: 192.168.0.4:9002
    load_balancing: round_robin

routes:
  - paths:
      - /api/v1/service1
    services:
      - name: service1
        upstreams:
          - name: upstream-service1

  - paths:
      - /api/v1/service2
    services:
      - name: service2
        upstreams:
          - name: upstream-service2
